'''Darth Karnage''' was a [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. As with many [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]] throughout [[Timeline of galactic history/Legends|history]], Karnage's name included the [[Darth/Legends|Darth]] title.<ref name="blog" />

==Behind the scenes==
Darth Karnage was mentioned in a [[2006]] [[Star Wars: Blogs|blog]] entry written by [[Leland Chee]], the keeper of the [[Holocron continuity database]]. Karnage was the only Sith listed in the blog post who never appeared or received a mention in another source. The entry indicates that Karnage's name is possibly derived from the word "carnage,"<ref name="blog" /> meaning extensive slaughter or butchery of others.<ref name="dictionary">{{WebCite|url=http://dictionary.reference.com/browse/carnage|text=Carnage|work=Dictionary.com|archivedate=20180325075614}}</ref>
